outages.headline: After Squandering $25B In Refinery Overhauls, Nigeria Turns To Chinese Firms
outages.summary: After a series of failed and costly attempts to revamp its aging refineries, Nigeria’s national oil company, the Nigerian National Petroleum Company Limited (NNPC), has signed a new agreement with Chinese firms to revive its moribund facilities. The NNPC has signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with Sanjiang Chemical Company Limited and Xinganchen (Fuzhou) Industrial Park Operation and Management Co. Ltd for the completion, operation and maintenance of the Port Harcourt (210,000 bpd) and Warri (125,000 bpd) refineries under a Technical…

outages.headline: Rebalancing the liquids markets amid SOH disruption
outages.summary: In this Market Pulse, we analyse how the market is rebalancing after the removal of around 20 Mbd of flows through the Strait of Hormuz. The adjustment is being driven by supply cuts, refinery run reductions, limited rerouting, demand erosion, and inventory drawdowns, but remains incomplete, leaving the system structurally tighter. Sixty days into the ...
